failure_reason: Added the next BML-owned source-lowering slice as high-level BML classes/templates/generic multiline methods, plus a minimal Form proof bridge that lowers parsed BML declarations into compiler-object sections. The first bridge used higher-order predicate passing and diverged on TypeScript; replaced it with explicit loops. Initial proof score exposed that the bootstrap parser was not exposing new class bodies; added those BML class names to the existing body-enabled list. Final source-lowering proof returns 41 across Go/Rust/TypeScript, the prior BML source proof remains 42, the BMF/BML picture remains 112251, BML compiler runtime remains 68, and BML reference runtime remains 524488.
